query:
UPDATE `membershipPackages` SET 
  monthlyPrice = CASE 
    WHEN name = 'Foundation' THEN 149.00
    WHEN name = 'Black Belt' THEN 199.00
    WHEN name = 'Leadership' THEN 249.00
  END,
  registrationFee = 98.00,
  downPayment = 294.00,
  description = CASE
    WHEN name = 'Foundation' THEN 'Month-to-month program for beginners. Cancel with 60-day notice.'
    WHEN name = 'Black Belt' THEN 'Month-to-month comprehensive program. Cancel with 60-day notice.'
    WHEN name = 'Leadership' THEN 'Month-to-month elite program (invitation only). Cancel with 60-day notice.'
  END
WHERE name IN ('Foundation', 'Black Belt', 'Leadership');
